title: solidago microglossa var. linearifolia
intro: Solidago microglossa var. linearifolia, also known as linear-leaf goldenrod, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The linear-leaf goldenrod is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for consumption, or used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
